items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
items_flat.title_zh: xAI推出Grok 4.5，專為程式開發與代理人工作優化
items_flat.summary_en: xAI introduced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, built on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor coding data. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, delivering Opus-class performance at higher speed and lower cost.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI推出至今最強的Grok 4.5，建基於全新大型V9基礎模型並結合Cursor程式資料。模型鎖定真實世界軟體工程、代理人工作流與知識工作，提供Opus級表現，同時更快、更省token且成本更低。
items_flat.analysis_en: The explicit focus on Cursor co-training and practical efficiency metrics positions xAI as a strong contender in the coding-agent niche where speed, cost and real-world engineering utility increasingly decide adoption.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 明確強調與Cursor共同訓練及實用效率指標，讓xAI在程式代理人領域成為強力競爭者，速度、成本與真實工程效用正成為採用關鍵。
items_flat.quote: It is an Opus-class model, but faster, more token-efficient and lower cost.
items_flat.quote_zh: 這是Opus級模型，但更快、更省token且成本更低。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs outline joint bioresilience approach
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind與Isomorphic Labs公布聯合生物韌性策略
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint approach to bioresilience, detailing how frontier AI models will support prevention, detection and response to biological threats. The plan covers over 15 partnerships and concrete tools including SynthID for DNA.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind與Isomorphic Labs發表聯合生物韌性方針，說明前沿AI模型如何支援生物威脅的預防、偵測與應對。計畫涵蓋超過15個合作夥伴關係，並包含SynthID DNA等具體工具。
items_flat.analysis_en: The post formalizes a dual-use posture that treats AI both as a potential risk amplifier and as essential infrastructure for biosecurity. Concrete tooling (SynthID for DNA, AlphaEvolve-style systems) will determine whether the approach delivers measurable resilience gains.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此文正式確立雙用途立場，視AI既為潛在風險放大器，也是生物安全必要基礎設施。具體工具（如DNA SynthID、AlphaEvolve類系統）將決定此策略能否帶來可衡量的韌性提升。
items_flat.quote: We are committed to working openly and collaboratively — with biosecurity labs, governments and the broader scientific community — to ensure AI is developed and deployed responsibly to help protect against one of society’s greatest risks.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們承諾與生物安全實驗室、政府及更廣泛的科學社群公開合作，確保 AI 以負責任的方式開發與部署，幫助防範社會最大風險之一。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI advances automated red-teaming for GPT-5.6 Sol development
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI推進GPT-5.6 Sol開發的自動化紅隊測試
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI detailed its use of extensive automated red-teaming, including over 700,000 A100e GPU hours dedicated to discovering universal jailbreaks, as part of preparing GPT-5.6 Sol. This self-play and continuous adversarial testing approach was applied before general availability.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI詳細說明其大規模自動化紅隊測試，包括投入超過70萬A100e GPU小時尋找通用越獄手法，作為GPT-5.6 Sol準備工作的一部分。此自我對弈與持續對抗測試方法於全面推出前完成。
items_flat.analysis_en: Automated red-teaming at this scale creates a genuine safety flywheel and improves robustness, but heavy reliance on internal automated systems limits external verification. The depth of disclosed methodology remains a key uncertainty for independent assessment.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此規模的自動化紅隊測試可建立真實安全飛輪並提升強健性，但過度依賴內部自動化系統限制外部驗證。揭露方法論的深度仍是獨立評估的關鍵不確定性。
items_flat.quote: We’ve also dedicated over 700,000 A100e GPU hours to automatically find universal jailbreaks, and we will run automated red teaming continuously during deployment.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們也投入超過 70 萬 A100e GPU 小時自動尋找通用越獄，並將在部署期間持續執行自動紅隊測試。

links.label: OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub - GPT-5.6 System Card

items_flat.title_en: Meta begins alerting parents when teens discuss self-harm with Meta AI
items_flat.title_zh: Meta開始在青少年與Meta AI討論自傷時向家長發送警示
items_flat.summary_en: Meta announced that parents using Instagram supervision tools will now receive alerts if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI. Flagged conversations undergo manual review; the feature is live in the US, UK, Australia and Canada.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta宣布，使用Instagram監督工具的家長，若青少年與Meta AI討論自殺或自傷，將收到警示。標記對話會經人工審核；功能已在美國、英國、澳洲與加拿大上線。
items_flat.analysis_en: The move sets a concrete industry precedent for AI companion safety by involving human review and parental notification. Success will depend on false-positive rates, review quality and whether teens simply migrate to less-monitored alternatives.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此舉透過人工審核與家長通知，為AI陪伴安全建立具體產業先例。成敗取決於誤報率、審核品質，以及青少年是否轉向監控較少的替代方案。
items_flat.quote: Parents using Instagram supervision tools will now be notified if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI.
items_flat.quote_zh: 使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷，現將收到通知。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI raises ChatGPT custom instructions limit to 5,000 characters
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI將ChatGPT自訂指令上限提高至5,000字元
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI increased the character limit for custom instructions in ChatGPT from 1,500 to 5,000 for Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education users. This allows more detailed and persistent user personas and context. Free and Go tiers remain at the previous limit.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI將ChatGPT自訂指令字元上限從1,500提高至5,000，適用於Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business與Education用戶。這讓用戶能設定更詳細且持久的人設與上下文。免費與Go方案維持原上限。
items_flat.analysis_en: A quiet but practical quality-of-life upgrade that reduces friction for power users who previously had to re-state context every session. It also quietly widens the capability gap between paid and free tiers.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這是安靜但實用的體驗升級，減少重度用戶每次對話都需重述上下文的摩擦，同時悄悄拉大付費與免費方案的能力差距。
items_flat.quote: Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business, and Education users can now save up to 5,000 characters.
items_flat.quote_zh: Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶現可儲存最多 5,000 字元。

links.label: OpenAI Help Center / ChatGPT Release Notes

xai.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
xai.title_zh: xAI推出Grok 4.5，專為程式開發與代理人工作優化
xai.summary_en: xAI introduced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, built on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor coding data. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, delivering Opus-class performance at higher speed and lower cost.

brief_en: xAI launched Grok 4.5 for coding and agentic workflows. Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs detailed a joint bioresilience strategy. OpenAI advanced large-scale automated red-teaming ahead of GPT-5.6 Sol and raised ChatGPT custom-instructions limits. Meta began parental alerts for teen self-harm talks with Meta AI.
brief_zh: xAI推出Grok 4.5，專攻程式與代理人工作。Google DeepMind與Isomorphic Labs公布聯合生物韌性策略。OpenAI強化GPT-5.6 Sol自動化紅隊測試，並調高ChatGPT自訂指令上限。Meta開始對青少年與Meta AI討論自傷時向家長發送警示。
